title: 10 best herbal creams for sleep deprivation

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Valerian creams helps with sleep deprivation because they contain natural ingredients that promote relaxation and calmness. The active compounds in valerian root, such as isovaleric acid and valerenic acid, interact with the brain's neurotransmitters to reduce stress and anxiety, making it easier to fall asleep. Additionally, valerian creams can help regulate the body's sleep-wake cycle by increasing the production of melatonin, a hormone that regulates sleep and wakefulness. As a result, people who use valerian creams experience improved sleep quality, duration, and overall sleep hygiene.
remedy_properties: Sedative and relaxing effects: Valerian root contains compounds that interact with GABA receptors in the brain, promoting relaxation, reducing anxiety and stress, and helping to fall asleep faster.
Anxiolytic (anti-anxiety) properties: The sedative effect of valerian root also helps reduce anxiety and worry, making it easier to calm down before bed and stay asleep throughout the night.
Muscle relaxant properties: Valerian cream can help soothe muscle tension and cramps, which are common causes of insomnia, allowing for a deeper and more restful sleep.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in valerenic acid, a key compound that helps promote relaxation and reduce stress.
Rhizomes: Contain sesquiterpenes, which have been shown to have sedative properties and help with anxiety relief.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 500g of dried valeriana officinalis root, ensuring it has no signs of spoilage or contamination.
Grind the valeriana officinalis root into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle, taking approximately 10 minutes.
Mix 250g of beeswax with 125g of coconut oil in a double boiler, melting the mixture over low heat for 20 minutes.
Add 50g of ground valeriana officinalis root powder to the melted wax-oil mixture, stirring well to combine for an additional 5 minutes.
Remove the mixture from the heat and let it cool to around 60°c before whipping into a smooth cream consistency using an electric mixer, taking approximately 10-15 minutes.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: English lavender creams helps with sleep deprivation because of its calming and relaxing properties. The gentle scent of lavender oil, found in many herbal English lavender creams, promotes a sense of tranquility and serenity, making it easier to fall asleep and stay asleep. Additionally, the cream's soothing ingredients work to calm an overactive mind and body, creating a peaceful environment for a restful night's sleep.
remedy_properties: Sedative and calming effects: Lavender's sedative properties help to calm the mind and body, reducing anxiety and stress, making it easier to fall asleep.

Antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties: Lavender's antioxidants and anti-inflammatory agents can help reduce inflammation in the body and brain, which is often linked to sleep deprivation, promoting a restful night's sleep.
Relaxation and reduced muscle tension: The calming effects of lavender can also help relax muscles and reduce physical tension, making it easier to fall asleep and stay asleep throughout the night.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in essential oils and saponins, which help to calm the nervous system and promote relaxation, making them suitable for use in sleep-promoting creams.
Flowers: Packed with linalool, a natural relaxant that helps reduce anxiety and stress, allowing individuals to fall asleep faster and sleep more soundly.
remedy_recipe: Gather high-quality dried lavandula angustifolia flowers and skin-friendly carrier oils such as coconut or sweet almond oil.
Combine one tablespoon of dried lavender flowers with two tablespoons of carrier oil in a clean glass jar for infusing.
Allow the mixture to steep at room temperature for 14 hours or overnight to release the essential oils from the lavender.
Strain the infusion using cheesecloth or a coffee filter into another clean glass container and discard the solids after 15 minutes of squeezing.
Add one tablespoon of beeswax pellets to the infused oil mixture and heat it gently in a double boiler for 30 minutes until melted and smooth.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Lemon balm creams helps with sleep deprivation because they contain a soothing and calming essential oil that promotes relaxation and reduces stress levels. The natural properties of lemon balm work to calm an overactive mind, allowing individuals to fall asleep faster and stay asleep longer. Additionally, the cream's gentle application can help to quiet a restless body, creating a sense of calm and tranquility that is ideal for a restful night's sleep. As a result, herbal lemon balm creams can be a valuable tool in managing chronic sleep deprivation.
remedy_properties: Anxiolytic (anti-anxiety) effects: Lemon balm cream's anxiolytic properties can help reduce anxiety levels, making it easier to fall asleep and stay asleep.
Muscle relaxant properties: The presence of rosmarinic acid in lemon balm cream can help relax muscles, reducing restlessness and promoting a sense of calm, making it easier to drift off to sleep.

Sedative effects: Lemon balm's sedative properties can help regulate the body's natural sleep-wake cycle, also known as the circadian rhythm, by increasing the levels of serotonin and melatonin in the brain.
remedy_parts: Roots: Lemon balm roots are rich in antioxidants and have a calming effect, making them ideal for promoting relaxation and reducing stress, which can aid in sleep deprivation.
Leaves: Lemon balm leaves contain rosmarinic acid, an antioxidant that helps reduce inflammation and promote relaxation, making it effective in combating insomnia and promoting restful sleep.
remedy_recipe: Harvest melissa officinalis leaves fresh or dried according to local regulations and guidelines.
Dry the harvested melissa officinalis leaves in a warm dark place for several days to reduce moisture content.
Combine 200g of dried melissa officinalis leaves with 100ml of coconut oil in a glass jar and let it infuse for 4-6 weeks.
Strain the infused mixture through a cheesecloth or coffee filter into another glass container and discard the solids.
Mix the resulting herbal extract with 100g of beeswax and 50g of sweet almond oil to create a soothing cream that can be applied topically before bed.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Maypop creams helps with sleep deprivation because they contain Passiflora incarnata, a natural herb that has been traditionally used to calm the mind and body. The cream's soothing properties help to reduce stress and anxiety, making it easier to fall asleep and stay asleep throughout the night. Additionally, maypop's sedative effects work to slow down racing thoughts and promote relaxation, allowing individuals to drift off into a peaceful slumber and wake up feeling refreshed and rejuvenated.
remedy_properties: Passionflower (Passiflora incarnata): Maypop creams often contain passionflower, which has a sedative effect on the nervous system, helping to calm anxiety and promote relaxation, making it easier to fall asleep.

Valerian root: Valerian root is another common ingredient in maypop creams that can help with sleep deprivation. It has a calming effect on the central nervous system, reducing stress and promoting relaxation, which can improve the quality of sleep.

Lavender oil: Lavender oil, often added to maypop creams, has a soothing and calming effect on the mind and body, reducing anxiety and promoting a sense of calmness, making it easier to fall asleep and stay asleep.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in sedative compounds, the roots help to calm the mind and body, promoting relaxation and reducing insomnia.
Seeds: Containing anti-inflammatory properties, the seeds can soothe the nervous system and reduce stress levels, making it easier to fall asleep.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh passiflora incarnata leaves and flowers in the morning after the dew has dried.
Dry the harvested plant material in a warm oven at 50°c for 6 hours or air-dry it for 7 days.
Combine 20g of dried passiflora incarnata with 100ml of coconut oil in a double boiler and steep for 4 hours.
Strain the mixture through cheesecloth into a clean container discarding the solids and let cool to room temperature.
Whip 50g of beeswax with 10g of sweet almond oil until smooth then add the passiflora incarnata infused coconut oil mixture.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Hops creams helps with sleep deprivation because they contain a unique blend of bioactive compounds that promote relaxation and reduce stress levels. The alpha acids in hops have a sedative effect, calming the nervous system and inducing a sense of tranquility. Additionally, the cream's moisturizing properties soothe and calm the skin, creating a conducive environment for a restful night's sleep. By promoting relaxation and reducing inflammation, herbal hop creams can help individuals with insomnia or restless sleep patterns get the deep, restorative sleep they need.
remedy_properties: Alpha-Bisabolol: A natural anti-inflammatory compound that soothes skin irritations, reduces anxiety and stress, and promotes relaxation, making it easier to fall asleep.
Humulone: A sesquiterpene with sedative and calming properties, which can help reduce restlessness and promote a sense of calmness, leading to improved sleep quality.
Farnesol: An essential oil with anxiolytic and anticonvulsant properties, which can help alleviate anxiety and stress, promoting relaxation and reducing the time it takes to fall asleep.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the hops plant contain a high concentration of sesquiterpenoids, which have been shown to promote relaxation and reduce anxiety.
Buds: Hops buds are rich in flavonoids, which can help to calm the mind and body, making them an effective ingredient for sleep-promoting creams.
remedy_recipe: Harvest and dry 10-15% of dried hops flowers for every 100ml of cream base.
Combine 20g of dried hops flowers with 200ml of cold-pressed coconut oil in a double boiler.
Steep the mixture at room temperature for 24 hours, allowing the essential oils to infuse into the oil.
Strain the mixture through a cheesecloth or coffee filter and discard the solids after 2 hours of preparation time.
Mix the infused oil with 80g of beeswax and 20g of vitamin e oil to create a smooth and creamy consistency.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Chamomile creams helps with sleep deprivation because of its calming and soothing properties, which help to relax the mind and body. The anti-inflammatory compounds in chamomile work to reduce stress and anxiety, making it easier to fall asleep. Additionally, chamomile's apigenic properties bind to GABA receptors in the brain, promoting a sense of relaxation and reducing muscle tension. As a result, using herbal chamomile creams as part of a bedtime routine can lead to improved sleep quality, reduced fatigue, and increased energy levels during the day.
remedy_properties: Anxiolytic properties: Chamomile contains apigenin, an antioxidant that binds to GABA receptors in the brain, promoting relaxation and reducing anxiety, which can contribute to sleep deprivation.
Sedative properties: The flavonoids and terpenes present in chamomile have a sedative effect on the nervous system, helping to calm the body and mind, making it easier to fall asleep and stay asleep.

Anti-inflammatory properties: Chamomile has anti-inflammatory effects that can help reduce muscle tension, joint pain, and other discomforts that may be disrupting sleep, allowing for a more restful night's sleep.
remedy_parts: Roots: Chamomile roots are rich in apigenin, an antioxidant that helps calm the nervous system and promote relaxation.
Seeds: Chamomile seeds contain a unique compound called alpha-bisabolol, which has anti-inflammatory properties that can help soothe skin irritations and promote a restful night's sleep.
remedy_recipe: Harvest dried flowers of matricaria chamomilla in sufficient quantity for the recipe.
Combine 20g of dried chamomile flowers with 100ml of olive oil and steep for 2 hours.
Strain the mixture through a cheesecloth or coffee filter into a clean glass container.
Add 5g of beeswax and heat the mixture in a double boiler until the wax is fully incorporated.
Remove from heat and let it cool before whipping with an electric mixer to desired consistency.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Yellow jessamine creams helps with sleep deprivation because they contain a natural sedative compound called passionflower extract, which has been used for centuries to promote relaxation and calmness. This extract works by interacting with GABA receptors in the brain, slowing down the nervous system and promoting a sense of tranquility. As a result, users of yellow jessamine creams may find it easier to fall asleep and stay asleep, helping to alleviate symptoms of insomnia and other sleep disorders.
remedy_properties: Aromachological properties: Yellow Jessamine cream's calming scent has a sedative effect, helping to relax the mind and body, making it easier to fall asleep.

Anxiolytic and anti-stress compounds: The cream contains compounds like flavonoids and alkaloids that have anxiolytic (anxiety-reducing) effects, which can help calm the nervous system and promote a restful night's sleep.

Muscle relaxant properties: Yellow Jessamine has been traditionally used to relieve muscle tension and spasms, which is often a contributing factor to insomnia; by relaxing muscles, it helps create a conducive environment for sleep.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in sesquiterpenoids, which have been shown to promote relaxation and reduce stress levels, making them effective in inducing sleep.
Buds: Containing flavonoids and phenolic acids, these help regulate sleep-wake cycles by modulating the body's circadian rhythms.
remedy_recipe: Gather required ingredients including dried gelsemium sempervirens root powder 30g and cold-pressed coconut oil 120ml.
Combine the gelsemium sempervirens root powder with a small amount of carrier oil in a double boiler to create a paste mixture.
Heat the mixture in the double boiler for 30 minutes while stirring occasionally until the paste reaches a temperature of 160°f.
Remove the mixture from heat and let it cool to around 100°f before whipping it into a creamy consistency with an immersion blender.
Transfer the cream to sterilized glass containers and store them in the refrigerator for up to 6 months or freeze for longer preservation.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Broad-leaved lime creams helps with sleep deprivation because they contain a unique blend of natural herbs and essential oils that work together to promote relaxation and reduce stress levels. The calming properties of the herbs, such as valerian root and chamomile, help to slow down brain activity and prepare the body for a restful night's sleep. Additionally, the cream's soothing aroma can also help to calm the mind and body, making it easier to fall asleep and stay asleep throughout the night.
remedy_properties: Apigenin: A flavonoid compound found in broad-leaved lime, apigenin has a sedative effect on the nervous system, helping to calm the mind and body for a restful night's sleep.
Citral: Citral is a natural monoterpene that can help regulate the body's circadian rhythms and promote relaxation, making it easier to fall asleep and stay asleep throughout the night.
Volatile oils: The volatile oils present in broad-leaved lime creams have a calming effect on the nervous system, reducing anxiety and stress levels, which are common causes of sleep deprivation.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the broad-leaved lime plant have a calming effect on the nervous system, making them ideal for use in medicinal creams to promote relaxation and improve sleep quality.
Barks: The barks of the broad-leaved lime plant contain compounds that help to reduce stress and anxiety, which are often associated with sleep deprivation.
remedy_recipe: Harvest high-quality tilia platyphyllos flowers and dry them according to traditional methods for 7-10 days.
Mix dried tilia platyphyllos flowers with beeswax and sweet almond oil in a 1:3 ratio by weight, adding jojoba oil as emollient.
Infuse the mixture in a double boiler at 160°f for 30 minutes, then filter and discard the solids after cooling to 120°f.
Whip the infused oil mixture with an immersion blender until it reaches a creamy consistency, taking approximately 5-7 minutes to process.
Fill sterilized jars with the prepared cream and store in the refrigerator for up to 6 months or freeze for longer-term storage.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Asiatic pennywort creams helps with sleep deprivation because they contain a unique blend of herbs that promote relaxation and calmness. The cream's active ingredients, such as Brahmi and Gotu Kola, have been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine to soothe the mind and body, reducing stress and anxiety that often contribute to insomnia. By applying the cream topically before bed, individuals can experience a sense of tranquility and calm, making it easier to fall asleep and stay asleep throughout the night.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant Properties: Asiatic pennywort creams contain antioxidants that help neutralize free radicals, which can contribute to oxidative stress and disrupt sleep patterns.

Sedative and Calming Effects: The cream's active compounds, such as flavonoids and alkaloids, have a sedative and calming effect on the nervous system, helping to reduce anxiety and promote relaxation, making it easier to fall asleep.
Anti-Inflammatory Properties: Asiatic pennywort creams also possess anti-inflammatory properties, which can help alleviate chronic pain and inflammation that may be interfering with sleep.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in saponins and flavonoids, which help to calm the nervous system and promote relaxation.
Rhyzomes: Contain anti-inflammatory compounds that reduce stress and anxiety, leading to improved sleep quality.
remedy_recipe: Harvest centella asiatica leaves from your garden or purchase from a reputable supplier weighing approximately 200g.
Dry the harvested leaves in a clean and well-ventilated area at room temperature for 7 days stirring occasionally.
Combine dried centella asiatica leaves with 100ml of carrier oil such as coconut or sweet almond oil in a double boiler mixing thoroughly.
Heat the mixture in the double boiler for 30 minutes then cool it down to room temperature allowing the infused oil to settle for 2 hours.
Strain the infused oil through cheesecloth into a clean container discarding the solids and add 20g of beeswax and 10ml of vitamin e oil mixing well until smooth and creamy.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Borage creams helps with sleep deprivation because they contain potent natural ingredients that promote relaxation and calmness, making it easier to fall asleep. The creams typically feature extracts from the borage flower, which are rich in omega-6 fatty acids and antioxidants. These compounds help to reduce inflammation, ease muscle tension, and regulate body temperature, all of which can contribute to a restful night's sleep. By addressing these underlying factors, herbal borage creams provide a natural solution for individuals struggling with insomnia and other sleep disorders.
remedy_properties: Omega-6 fatty acids: Borage cream contains gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), an omega-6 fatty acid that helps to reduce inflammation and promote relaxation, making it easier to fall asleep.
Anti-anxiety compounds: The herb St. John's Wort, commonly used in borage creams, has been shown to possess anti-anxiety properties, helping to calm the mind and body before sleep.
Soothing and calming effects: Borage cream's antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory properties help to soothe and calm irritated skin, reducing stress and anxiety that can interfere with sleep.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in anti-inflammatory compounds that help reduce restlessness and promote relaxation.
Seeds: Containing gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), an omega-6 fatty acid that supports the production of sleep-promoting neurotransmitters.
remedy_recipe: Gather fresh or dried borago officinalis leaves and flowers measuring about 30 grams for this recipe.
Combine the borago officinalis plant material with distilled water in a heat-resistant container at a ratio of 1:2.
Heat the mixture using a double boiler method over low heat for 20 minutes to extract the active compounds.
Strain the liquid through a cheesecloth or coffee filter into another container discarding the solids and let it cool to room temperature.
Mix the cooled infusion with beeswax and sweet almond oil in a ratio of 1:2:3 by weight then whip until smooth and creamy texture is achieved.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: St John's Wort creams helps with sleep deprivation because it contains hyperforin, a compound that has been shown to increase serotonin levels in the brain. Serotonin is a neurotransmitter that regulates mood and relaxation, which are both essential for falling asleep and staying asleep. By boosting serotonin production, St John's Wort creams can help to calm the mind and body, reducing stress and anxiety that often accompany sleep deprivation. This results in improved sleep quality, allowing individuals to wake up feeling rested and refreshed.
remedy_properties: Hyperforin: This compound has been shown to increase the levels of neurotransmitters such as serotonin and melatonin, which are involved in regulating sleep-wake cycles, promoting relaxation, and inducing drowsiness.
Flavonoids: St. John's Wort creams contain flavonoids, which have antioxidant properties that can help reduce inflammation and oxidative stress, both of which can disrupt sleep patterns.

Phenolic acids: These compounds have been found to have sedative effects by modulating the activity of neurotransmitters such as GABA and glutamate, which are involved in regulating sleep and anxiety.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in triterpenoids, which have been shown to promote relaxation and reduce anxiety.
Leaves: Contain flavonoids that have a calming effect on the nervous system, helping to regulate sleep patterns.
remedy_recipe: Harvest dried hypericum perforatum leaves and flowers of high quality.
Infuse the herbs in a carrier oil like sweet almond oil for 4 hours at room temperature.
Strain the mixture through cheesecloth into a clean glass container and discard solids immediately.
Mix 10% hypericin extract with beeswax and vitamin e oil in a double boiler for 20 minutes.
Cool the cream to around 140°f and pour it into sterilized jars within the next hour.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Milk thistle creams helps with sleep deprivation because they contain silymarin, a potent flavonoid that has been shown to promote relaxation and reduce stress levels. When applied topically, silymarin can calm the nervous system, reducing symptoms of anxiety and restlessness that often contribute to sleep disturbances. Additionally, milk thistle's antioxidant properties can help soothe inflammation in the brain, promoting a deeper and more restful sleep. By addressing these underlying factors, milk thistle creams can help individuals overcome sleep deprivation and wake up feeling refreshed and rejuvenated.
remedy_properties: Silymarin: Helps to reduce inflammation and oxidative stress in the body, which can contribute to insomnia and sleep disruption by promoting relaxation and calming the mind and body.
Flavonoids: Act as antioxidants to neutralize free radicals that can interfere with normal sleep patterns, promoting a sense of calmness and reducing anxiety and restlessness at night.

Siliphos: Has been shown to improve liver function and detoxification, which can help reduce the buildup of toxins in the body that may be disrupting sleep and promoting a sense of fatigue and exhaustion.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in saponins, which have anti-inflammatory and sedative properties that can help alleviate insomnia and promote relaxation.
Seeds: Containing a high concentration of flavonoids, these seeds have been traditionally used to calm the nervous system and induce restful sleep.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh silybum marianum leaves and flowers from a trusted source or purchase dried herbs from a reputable supplier.
Combine 20 grams of dried silybum marianum herb with 100 milliliters of carrier oil such as sweet almond oil in a heat-resistant glass container.
Infuse the mixture by placing it in a double boiler and gently heating it to 60°c over 30 minutes, then straining the liquid through cheesecloth or a coffee filter.
Combine the infused oil with 10 grams of beeswax and 5 milliliters of vitamin e oil, heating the mixture until the wax is fully incorporated and the consistency is smooth.
Pour the herbal cream into sterilized glass jars and store them in the refrigerator for up to six months, using as needed before bedtime and massaging it onto the skin before sleep.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Chinese date creams helps with sleep deprivation because they contain natural sedatives and relaxants that calm the mind and body. The herbal extracts, such as chamomile and licorice root, promote relaxation and reduce stress levels, making it easier to fall asleep. Additionally, the creams' ability to nourish and moisturize the skin can help alleviate symptoms of insomnia, such as dryness and irritation, allowing for a more restful night's sleep. By promoting relaxation and addressing underlying causes of insomnia, these creams provide a natural solution for overcoming sleep deprivation.
remedy_properties: Jujube (Ziziphus jujuba): Jujube helps to calm the mind and body, promoting relaxation and reducing stress levels, which can aid in falling asleep.
Dried Reishi Mushroom (Ganoderma lucidum): Dried Reishi mushroom has a sedative effect, helping to reduce anxiety and promote a sense of calm, making it easier to fall into a deep sleep.
Licorice Root (Glycyrrhiza glabra): Licorice root helps to soothe the nervous system, reducing stress and anxiety, and promoting relaxation, which can improve the quality of sleep.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in flavonoids and saponins, the roots have a calming effect on the nervous system, making them ideal for promoting relaxation and improving sleep quality.
Rhyzomes: Containing sesquiterpenes, rhyzomes have sedative properties that help to reduce anxiety and stress, contributing to better sleep.
remedy_recipe: Harvest and dry ziziphus jujuba fruits in shade for three days before grinding them into fine powder.
Combine 200g of the ziziphus jujuba powder with 100g of coconut oil and 50g of beeswax in a double boiler.
Heat the mixture under low heat stirring occasionally until the wax melts and the mixture reaches 120 degrees fahrenheit after 30 minutes.
Add 20g of lavender essential oil and 10g of chamomile essential oil to the mixture and stir well for an additional five minutes.
Remove from heat let cool and pour into glass containers for storage and use before bedtime.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Oats creams helps with sleep deprivation because they contain natural ingredients that promote relaxation and calmness, making it easier to fall asleep. The soothing properties of oat extracts can help reduce stress and anxiety, allowing the mind and body to unwind and prepare for a restful night's sleep. Additionally, herbs such as chamomile and lavender found in herbal oats creams have been shown to have a calming effect on the nervous system, further enhancing their sleep-promoting benefits.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Herbal oat creams containing anti-inflammatory compounds like avenanthramides and beta-glucans can reduce inflammation in the body, which is often exacerbated by sleep deprivation and can lead to chronic pain and discomfort.

Soothing and calming properties: The emollient and soothing properties of herbal oat creams can calm irritated skin and promote relaxation, helping to create a conducive environment for a good night's sleep.

Antioxidant properties: Antioxidants present in herbal oat creams, such as vitamins E and C, can help neutralize free radicals that build up during periods of chronic sleep deprivation, which can contribute to oxidative stress and related health issues.
remedy_parts: Roots: Oat roots contain saponins, which have been shown to promote relaxation and reduce anxiety, making them an effective ingredient in creams for sleep deprivation.
Barks: Oat barks have anti-inflammatory properties that can help soothe the skin and calm the mind, promoting a restful night's sleep.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 2 ounces of dried avena sativa oat tops and grind them into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle within 15 minutes.
Mix the powdered avena sativa with 2 tablespoons of coconut oil and 1 tablespoon of beeswax in a small saucepan over low heat for 10 minutes.
Add 5 drops of lavender essential oil and 2 teaspoons of calendula flowers to the mixture, stirring well to combine within 5 minutes.
Remove the saucepan from heat and let it cool until the mixture reaches 120°f to 140°f, then whisk until smooth for 10 minutes.
Pour the cream into a sterilized glass jar, seal tightly, and refrigerate at 40°f to 50°f for at least 2 hours before use.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Yellow bedstraw creams helps with sleep deprivation because they promote relaxation and reduce stress levels. The herb's active compounds, flavonoids and phenolic acids, work to calm the mind and body, making it easier to fall asleep and stay asleep. By addressing underlying sleep disorders and promoting a restful night's sleep, herbal yellow bedstraw creams can help individuals overcome the negative effects of sleep deprivation, including fatigue, mood disturbances, and impaired cognitive function.
remedy_properties: Anxiolytic and sedative properties: Galium verum may help reduce anxiety and promote relaxation, making it easier to fall asleep.
Antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties: The plant's antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds may help reduce inflammation and oxidative stress, which can contribute to sleep disturbances.
Hormone-balancing properties: Galium verum may help regulate hormone levels, including those involved in the body's natural sleep-wake cycle, such as melatonin and serotonin.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in saponins, which help to calm the nervous system and promote relaxation.
Seeds: Contain a sedative compound that helps to regulate sleep patterns and induce deep sleep.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh galium mollugo leaves and flowers on a dry morning to ensure potency and effectiveness.
Dry the harvested galium mollugo leaves and flowers in a warm place for 7-10 days to reduce moisture content.
Infuse 200g of dried galium mollugo in 1 liter of carrier oil (coconut or jojoba) for 2-3 weeks in a cool dark place.
Filter the infused oil through a cheesecloth or coffee filter to separate the plant material and obtain a clear oil extract.
Mix 100g of the galium mollugo oil extract with 100g of beeswax and 20g of vitamin e oil to create a smooth and creamy texture.

intro_desc: Herbal creams for sleep deprivation are topical products infused with natural ingredients, such as essential oils, botanicals, and herbs, specifically designed to promote relaxation and improve sleep quality. These creams work by calming the mind and body, reducing stress and anxiety, and inducing a restful night's sleep. Examples of herbal creams that help with sleep deprivation include those containing valerian root, chamomile, and lavender, which have been shown to reduce symptoms of insomnia and promote deep relaxation. By using these creams, individuals can improve the quality of their sleep, leading to increased energy, improved mood, and enhanced overall well-being.
supplementary_best_treatment: The best way to treat sleep deprivation with herbal creams is to apply topical formulations containing natural sedatives like valerian root, lavender, and chamomile. These ingredients promote relaxation, calmness, and reduce stress levels, making it easier to fall asleep and stay asleep. Look for products containing a blend of these herbs in a soothing base cream or oil to combat insomnia and wakefulness. Regular application can help regulate your sleep patterns and improve overall sleep quality.
supplementary_causes: Ailments similar to sleep deprivation that are treated with herbal creams are anxiety, stress, and restlessness. Herbal creams containing ingredients like lavender, chamomile, and valerian root are used to promote relaxation and calmness, helping to soothe irritability and insomnia. These natural remedies can provide a calming effect on the mind and body, alleviating symptoms of nervous tension and promoting a sense of tranquility.
